scripts.setup: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('server/.env')) fs.copyFileSync('server/.env.example', 'server/.env'); console.log('✅ Created server/.env from example. Please configure your keys.');"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
